canon_change_records.migration_note: Unknown-trust imported sources are now explicitly quarantined and cannot serve as evidence for approval or promotion. The current canonical rule lives in the source_trust gate rule and is regression-covered by source_poisoning_quarantine.

canon_context: v1.10.5.3 audited self-correction capstone over v1.10.5.2; no ontology expansion; no autonomous canon mutation

correction_trace_events.summary: Evaluator would have allowed unknown-trust imported evidence into an approval path; expected posture is blocked with source_trust_unknown_quarantine.
Proposed source trust gate patch requiring quarantine for unknown-trust imported sources.
Approved source-trust gate behavior and regression fixture coverage recorded.

coverage_notes: C07 resolved by adding positive edge cases: stale_low_risk_explain_bounded, provisional_draft_bounded, sod_valid_approve_path, trace_only_history_bounded, governed_compare_disclosed_conflict.
C08 resolved by adding role mismatch cases for reader, contributor, reviewer, LLM, and system_service.
C03 resolved by adding dominance_policy_stale_or_out_of_scope regression.
C09 resolved by adding context_allowed_basis to complete_passing_context_pack.
C12 addressed by source_poisoning_quarantine threat/control fixture.
C07 acceptance threshold met by raising non-blocked fixture coverage above 40% with bounded, answerable, and review_required positive edge cases.
v0.3 adds audited self-correction objects without introducing new planes, roles, zero modes, or active L6 mutation.
InformationResidenceMap provides the capstone locator for superseded, moved, quarantined, or active correction-related knowledge.
PatchProposal remains forbidden_auto_apply; reviewer/owner approval and CanonChangeRecord are mandatory before canon read paths change.

trace.basis: Current source version supersedes older training excerpt in this fixture.
Intentionally stale/out-of-scope policy for regression coverage.

reject_when: ontology_delta != none and pilot_report_ref is null
l6_behavior_delta == active and BaselineGateSignoff is absent
approved correction lacks regression_fixture_refs and no fixture waiver is recorded

execution_rule: Expected GateResults are declared before execution; actual results must be compared by posture, reason class, allowed/withheld context, route, trace event, RCT adequacy, L6 proposal permission, and context_allowed_basis. On expected-vs-actual mismatch or reviewer-validated correction, emit MistakeEvent and allow PatchProposal creation only; no patch may auto-apply without reviewer/owner approval, CanonChangeRecord, InformationResidenceMap update, and regression fixture coverage.

information_residence_map.human_readable_locator: Current source-trust rule: unknown-trust imported material is quarantined; approval/promote blocked; review and explain_limits only.
information_residence_map.reason: A fixture-level source-poisoning mistake demonstrated that unknown-trust imports must not conduct into approval paths.
Regression fixture prevents recurrence of the false-allow pathway.

information_residence_map.human_readable_locator: CanonChangeRecord canon_change_source_trust_quarantine_001 links MistakeEvent, PatchProposal, GateRule, and regression fixtures.
information_residence_map.reason: Approved patch movement into canon required a durable change record.

resolved_items: C02/C13 L6 inactive until pilot signoff
C16 audited MistakeEvent → PatchProposal → CanonChangeRecord correction loop
C17 InformationResidenceMap answers where superseded information now lives
C18 regression fixture requirement for approved correction patches

metric_target_basis_records.rationale: Initial acceptability target for pilot reviewer agreement; not a validated production threshold.
Lower initial agreement target because zero-mode distinctions are expected to be harder than plane labels.
False allow requires adjudicated pilot examples before threshold selection.
False block must be measured after positive edge fixtures and real pilot queries expose overblocking.

patch_proposals.proposed_change: Unknown-trust imported sources must be quarantined. They cannot satisfy approve/promote gates and may conduct only to review_request/review/explain_limits routes with explicit source-trust warning.

plane_cards.claim_text: Current workflow policy requires reviewer trace before approval.
Audit sample shows approvals with reviewer trace had fewer correction events.
Reviewer trace: contrib_01 created, reviewer_01 reviewed, approver_01 approved.
A confidence score is present but no ScalarBasis record exists.
Older policy excerpt appears relevant but has exceeded refresh window.
Candidate canon created, reviewed, and approved by same actor.
Old training excerpt says contributor trace alone is sufficient for approval.
Current source says reviewer trace is required before approval.
Validity extension requested from no-change attestation without material evidence.
Ambiguous material cannot be honestly classified into existing planes.
Approver decision record accepts the current workflow policy within workflow_policy scope.
Provisional workflow interpretation may be drafted for reviewer review but not approved or promoted.
Untrusted imported source claims an approval rule but lacks source trust verification.

purpose: Concrete adversarial and positive-edge objects for validating gate behavior before pilot ontology work. v0.2 resolves Claude crosswalk gaps C03, C07, C08, and C09 by adding dominance-policy regression, positive edge cases, actor-role mismatch cases, and explicit context_allowed_basis. v0.3 adds an audited self-correction architecture: MistakeEvent → PatchProposal → reviewer adjudication → fixture/regression update → CanonChangeRecord → InformationResidenceMap. This is correction governance, not vague learning.

scalar_basis_records.valid_scope: internal pilot logging only; not displayable as calibrated

controlled_loop: InformationResidenceMap / SupersessionMap updates where information now lives
hard_guards: PatchProposal.forbidden_auto_apply must be true for every correction proposal.
Approved corrections require reviewer/owner adjudication based on proposal_type and blast_radius.
Canon changes require CanonChangeRecord before any canonical read path changes.
InformationResidenceMap must answer where superseded information now lives.
Every approved correction must link to at least one regression FixtureCase or explicitly declare why no fixture is possible.
L6 remains proposal-only; it may generate repair candidates but cannot apply them.
self_correction_architecture.normative_rule: Self-correction is audited correction, not autonomous learning. The system may detect mismatches and propose repairs, but it cannot silently mutate canon, authority, schema, routing, scalar thresholds, dominance policy, source trust, or validity windows.

threat_model_extensions.attack_pattern: A malicious, compromised, or bad-faith source enters the corpus with apparently valid metadata and later satisfies internal gates.
threat_model_extensions.gate_effect: unknown_or_low_trust_source cannot approve/promote and must route to domain_owner or authority_owner

verification_events.reviewer_basis: Reviewer checked a box but did not attach substantive source evidence.
Changed sections and source date reviewed.
